# Communication Tools


## Slack
Slack is our primary tool of communication within the lab. We also use it to archive data sheets, share papers, funding opportunities, places to eat, food adventures, and more. [email Jarrett](mailto:jarrett.byrnes@umb.edu) for an invite or, if you have one, go [here](http://byrneslab.slack.com/).

## Email
- All lab members can be reached by everyone@byrneslab.net
- Undergrads only can be reached by everyone_ug@byrneslab.net
- Non-undergrads only can be reached by everyone_noug@byrneslab.net
